title: Crossless Redstone Lamps
description: Simplifies and noises redstone lamps texture to be more clear
body:
Simplifies the redstone lamp texture by removing the cross in the center, and noise

If you prefer to have the textures not connected and use optifine simply delete the ctm folder

[32x Version](https://www.faithfulpack.net/addons/CrosslessRedstoneLamps)
